race.comment: COOL PANELS (2) had been right there in recent efforts and that culminated with a solid Ipswich victory last time out. Rock-hard fit now and can go right on with the job. The penny has dropped for EFFIE'S JOY (9) who has put back-to-back wins together and is racing with a lot of confidence of late. Has to be included in calculations. MUSIC FEVER (6) goes well for hoop Turner who has two wins and two placings from just six steers. Definite top-three prospects. The well-related LA SOEUR (4) (full to G2 winner Glistening) gets 2kg off with the claim and may earn some minor money. RETAINER (3) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated.
